creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Comment on attachment 188040
pdfcrack-0.16.patch

Thank you. I don't understand, why you removed the post-patch  target, however -- the upstream's Makefile still wants to add `-O3 -g` after the already set CFLAGS...

I also do not think, the README is worth installing -- there is nothing in it, that's useful to a user, in my opinion.
